# Omuz Serisi — Derleme (2026-03-29)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Determining the Level to Affect of Physical Findings and Outcome Measures on Functional Status in Partial-Thickness Rotator Cuff Tears Using a Multiple Linear Regression Model.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik determining the level to affect of physical findings and sonuç measures on fonksiyonal status in partial-thickness rotator manşet tears using a multiple linear regression model. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medicina (kaunas, lithuania). 2026 mar 19. Anahtar kavramlar: determining, level, affect, physical, findings, sonuç.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41901655/

### A Retrospective Clinical Analysis of Pain and Spasticity Outcomes Following Gravity-Support Exoskeleton Therapy in Chronic Stroke.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik a retrospective clinical analysis of ağrı and spasticity sonuçs following gravity-support exoskeleton therapy in chronic inme. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of clinical medicine. 2026 mar 10. Anahtar kavramlar: clinical, retrospective, analysis, ağrı, spasticity, sonuçs.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41899023/

### Clinical and Metabolic Predictors of Response to Focused Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy in Rotator Cuff Tendinopathy: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik clinical and metabolic predictors of response to focused extracorporeal shockwave therapy in rotator manşet tendinopathy: a retrospective cohort study. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medical sciences (basel, switzerland). 2026 feb 27. Anahtar kavramlar: clinical, metabolic, predictors, response, focused, extracorporeal.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41892829/

### Investigating the effects of eccentric stretching on pain, grip strength, and functional outcomes in patients with lateral epicondylopathy: a randomized controlled trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik investigating the effects of eccentric stretching on ağrı, grip strength, and fonksiyonal sonuçs in patients with lateral epicondylopathy: a randomize controlled klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: fizyoterapi theory and practice. 2026 mar 26. Anahtar kavramlar: investigating, effects, eccentric, stretching, ağrı, grip.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41885244/

### Psychometric Properties of a Smartphone Application for Measuring Shoulder Active Range of Motion in Individuals with and without Shoulder Pain and Mobility Deficits.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik psychometric properties of a smartphone application for measuring omuz active range of motion in individuals with and without omuz ağrı and mobility deficits. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of ağrı research. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: omuz, ağrı, psychometric, properties, smartphone, application.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41873382/
